metadata.title: Oscar Cristaudo — Full-stack developer
metadata.description: Portfolio of Oscar Cristaudo, full-stack developer at Eos Solutions and IVS 118 Piemonte volunteer rescuer and instructor.

hero.title: Oscar Cristaudo
hero.description: I build web apps and backend systems at Eos Solutions. On weekends, I train as an emergency medical volunteer in Piedmont.

about.heading: About
about.body: Eight years building software across frontend, backend, and mobile. Based in Piedmont, working full-stack at Eos Solutions — TypeScript/React on the web, C#/.NET underneath.

experience.heading: Experience
experience.description: Eos Solutions builds So Smart, a cloud ERP for SMEs on Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central. I work on both the AL core product and the web portals partners and clients use.

volunteering.heading: Volunteering
volunteering.description: I train new recruits and take part in regional rescue drills with ANPAS — the kind where a mock patient and a ticking clock decide if you got it right.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.description: Best way to reach me: email or LinkedIn.
